name: Full Stack Dev Container
postCreateCommand: cd /workspaces/pool-leaderboard && dotnet restore ./PoolLeaderboard.Server && dotnet build && dotnet dev-certs https --trust && echo 'Installing puppeteer chrome...' && npx --prefix ./poolleaderboard.client puppeteer browsers install chrome && echo 'Deploying DB' && ./PoolLeaderboard.Database/deploy.sh && echo 'Done!'
